name: GO TEAM Kids' Neon Light - Pillowfort™
description: Add positive, sporty vibes to your kid's space with the GO TEAM Kids' Neon Light from Pillowfort™. This neon light is designed in the shape of a sign bearing the message "GO TEAM!" to help keep them motivated, and it comes with integrated LED bulbs for a fun look and bright illumination. Made of acrylic, this light has an inline (cord) rocker switch for quick and easy operation.
